plan.title: DAG visualization: match vBRIEF Studio quality — edge labels, status badges, item metadata
plan.author: plan

narratives.Problem: The dashboard DAG visualization in PlanDAG.tsx is functional but visually basic compared to vBRIEF Studio. Missing: edge labels, status text badges, full-word difficulty/priority badges, distinct edge colors, adequate spacing, and enriched metadata panel.
narratives.Proposal: Implement all 6 improvements in two files (PlanDAG.tsx for nodes/edges/layout, BeadsTasksPanel.tsx for metadata panel). Use existing ReactFlow features (edge labels, marker styling) and the existing color palette.
narratives.Constraint: Must use existing ReactFlow v11.11.4 and dagre — no new dependencies. Dark theme only. Must preserve real-time socket.io updates and critical path highlighting.
narratives.Risk: Larger nodes may affect fit-view zoom (mitigated by ReactFlow auto-adjust). Edge labels may overlap on dense graphs (mitigated by small font with background).
narratives.Alternative: Tooltip-only labels (rejected — Studio shows them always). Custom edge components (rejected — inline labels sufficient for single-word types).

items.title: Add status text badges, full-word difficulty/priority badges to DAG nodes

narrative.Action: In PlanDAG.tsx PlanItemNode component: (1) Add a colored pill below the title showing status text (pending/in progress/completed/blocked/cancelled) using STATUS_COLORS palette. (2) Expand DIFFICULTY_LABELS from single letters to full words. (3) Replace the 6px priority dot with a labeled badge. (4) Increase NODE_WIDTH from 180→220, NODE_HEIGHT from 60→80.

subItems.title: Each node displays a colored status text badge (e.g. 'pending', 'completed') below the title
Difficulty shows as full word ('medium', 'complex') not single letter
Priority shown as a labeled badge ('high', 'low') not a colored dot
Node dimensions increased to ~220x80 to accommodate badges without crowding

items.title: Add edge type labels, distinct colors, and larger arrows to DAG edges

narrative.Action: In PlanDAG.tsx vbriefToFlow function: (1) Add label property to each edge with the type name ('blocks', 'informs', etc.). Style with 10px font, dark bg, light text. (2) Assign distinct stroke colors per edge type: blocks=#ef4444, informs=#3b82f6, suggests=#8b5cf6, invalidates=#f59e0b. (3) Increase markerEnd arrow size from 14x14 to 20x20, color-match to stroke. (4) Critical path edges retain orange override and animation.

subItems.title: Each edge displays its type name as a label on the connection line
Each edge type has a distinct color (blocks=red, informs=blue, suggests=purple, invalidates=amber)
Arrow markers are 20x20 and color-matched to edge stroke
Critical path edges retain orange color and animation, overriding per-type colors

items.title: Improve dagre spacing and enrich the item detail metadata panel

narrative.Action: Layout (PlanDAG.tsx): Increase dagre nodesep 40→60, ranksep 60→100. Metadata panel (BeadsTasksPanel.tsx PlanItemDetail): (1) Display all narrative fields (Problem, Constraint, Risk, etc.) not just Action. (2) Add sub-item completion progress ('2/5 criteria met'). (3) Show all incoming/outgoing edges with types and connected item titles (currently only shows 'blocks' edges).

subItems.title: Dagre layout uses nodesep=60 and ranksep=100 for reduced crowding
PlanItemDetail displays all narrative fields present on the item, not just Action
PlanItemDetail shows sub-item completion count (e.g. '2/5 criteria met')
PlanItemDetail lists all incoming and outgoing edges with type labels and connected item titles
